I am contacting you to inquire about a recent discrepancy on my account and require the full transaction details to understand the nature of the charge. This information is vital for my records.

Upon receiving the document, I will carefully review the transaction details provided and take the next necessary step. Thank you for your prompt attention. Sincerely, Customer<|im_end|>
